entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop studied in the evaluation of cultivation systems.

entities.name: SAMBA MAHSURI
entities.description: A specific rice cultivar (BPT 5204) used in the participatory field study.

entities.name: DIRECT DRY-SEEDED RICE
entities.description: A rice production system where seeds are sown directly into dry soil.

entities.name: TRANSPLANTED RICE
entities.description: A traditional rice production system involving the transplanting of seedlings into puddled fields.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: The Indian state where the study was conducted.

entities.name: RAICHUR DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Karnataka where the field study took place.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted.

entities.name: DRY ZONE
entities.description: The specific climatic region characterized by low rainfall and water scarcity.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total above-ground biomass.

entities.name: 1,000-GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of one thousand grains of rice.

entities.name: ABOVE-GROUND BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of the plant above the soil surface.

entities.name: WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in producing grain yield.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE TILLERS
entities.description: The number of tillers that produce grain panicles.

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the rice panicle, contributing to yield.

entities.name: ECONOMIC RETURNS
entities.description: The financial gain derived from the rice production system.

entities.name: PRODUCTION COST
entities.description: The total expenditure incurred during the cultivation process.

entities.name: NET RETURNS
entities.description: The profit remaining after subtracting production costs from total returns.

entities.name: BENEFIT-COST RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of total benefits to total costs of production.

entities.name: IRRIGATION WATER USE
entities.description: The volume of water applied to the crop via irrigation.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage.

entities.name: UNSTABLE WATER SUPPLY
entities.description: The inconsistent availability of water for irrigation.
